projectDescription: An Arduino library that translates the Arduino programming syntax into Spanish, enabling Spanish-speaking developers and students to code in their native language.
keyFeatures: Full Spanish translation of Arduino syntax (setup, loop, if/else, for, while, switch)
Spanish data types: entero, flotante, booleano, cadena, arreglo, and more
Spanish constants: ALTO, BAJO, ENTRADA, SALIDA, VERDADERO, FALSO
Spanish math functions: absoluto, raizCuadrada, seno, coseno, aleatorio, esPar
Spanish pin functions: configurarEntrada, configurarSalida, leerPin, encender, apagar
Optional modules for Serial, Servo, RGB LED, Stepper motor, EEPROM, LCD I2C, Ultrasonic sensor, TM1637 display
publicApiSurface: si / entonces / si_no / si_no_si (if/else control flow)
entero / flotante / booleano / cadena / Cadena (data types)
leerPin(pin, tipo) / salidaDigital(pin, valor) / salidaAnalogica(pin, valor)
esperar(tiempo, unidad) with MILISEGUNDOS / SEGUNDOS / MICROSEGUNDOS
INCLUIR_SERIE / INCLUIR_SERVO / INCLUIR_LED_RGB / INCLUIR_MOTOR_PAP / INCLUIR_EEPROM / INCLUIR_LCD_I2C / INCLUIR_ULTRASONICO / INCLUIR_TM1637
